_metadata.description: Metadata for the 13 cardiometabolic diseases in scope. Used for UI labels, color coding, and EFO ID lookup when calling search_proteins_by_disease.

diabetes_mellitus.label: Diabetes mellitus
diabetes_mellitus.description: Group of metabolic disorders characterized by hyperglycemia. Type 1 (autoimmune beta cell destruction) and Type 2 (insulin resistance with relative insulin deficiency) are the major forms.

obesity.label: Obesity
obesity.description: Excess body fat accumulation associated with health risks. BMI over 30 kg/m^2 is the clinical threshold.

metabolic_syndrome.label: Metabolic syndrome
metabolic_syndrome.description: Cluster of conditions including central obesity, hypertension, hyperglycemia, and dyslipidemia that increase cardiovascular and diabetes risk.

nafld.label: Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease
nafld.description: Hepatic steatosis without significant alcohol consumption. Spectrum includes simple steatosis, NASH, fibrosis, and cirrhosis.

cad.label: Coronary artery disease
cad.description: Atherosclerotic narrowing of coronary arteries leading to reduced myocardial perfusion. Major cause of MI and angina.

mi.label: Myocardial infarction
mi.description: Acute coronary occlusion leading to myocardial necrosis. Classified as STEMI or NSTEMI.

heart_failure.label: Heart failure
heart_failure.description: Inability of the heart to pump sufficient blood to meet metabolic demands. HFrEF, HFmrEF, and HFpEF subtypes by ejection fraction.

hypertension.label: Hypertension
hypertension.description: Chronic elevation of blood pressure above 130/80 mmHg per current guidelines. Major risk factor for stroke, MI, heart failure, and renal disease.

dyslipidemia.label: Dyslipidemia
dyslipidemia.description: Abnormal lipid levels including elevated LDL, low HDL, or elevated triglycerides. Major modifiable cardiovascular risk factor.

atherosclerosis.label: Atherosclerosis
atherosclerosis.description: Progressive arterial plaque formation. Underlies most cardiovascular disease. Foam cell formation, endothelial dysfunction, and chronic inflammation are key mechanisms.

afib.label: Atrial fibrillation
afib.description: Most common sustained cardiac arrhythmia. Disorganized atrial electrical activity leading to thrombus risk and embolic stroke.

stroke.label: Stroke
stroke.description: Acute neurological deficit due to cerebral ischemia (ischemic stroke) or hemorrhage (hemorrhagic stroke). Leading cause of disability worldwide.

fh.label: Familial hypercholesterolemia
fh.description: Inherited disorder of LDL clearance. LDLR, APOB, and PCSK9 variants account for most cases. Heterozygous FH affects 1 in 250.
